dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal detects candle breakouts within 2-4 days. Entry conditions capture upward breakouts (close > prev_high) and downward breakouts (close < prev_low). Exit conditions reverse the breakout direction. hold_days_min and hold_days_max enforce the 2-4 day window. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal applies to both long and short breakouts. Pattern uses previous bar extremes (prev_high, prev_low) as the candle top/bottom reference points.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal detects candle breakouts within 2-4 days. Entry conditions capture upward breakouts (close > prev_high) and downward breakouts (close < prev_low). Exit conditions reverse the breakout direction. hold_days_min and hold_days_max enforce the 2-4 day window. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal applies to both long and short breakouts. Pattern uses previous bar extremes (prev_high, prev_low) as the candle top/bottom reference points.

source_rule_text: Candle end to breakout: Price closes above the top (upward breakouts) or below the bottom (downward breakouts) within 2-4 days
